item.title: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.
item.description: First reading, referred to Ways & Means.

item.title: 👍Sheri Sawyer - Office of Financial Management
item.description: Sheri Sawyer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Financial Management.

item.title: 👎Jenny Arnold - Washington State Pharmacy Association
item.description: Jenny Arnold signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington State Pharmacy Association.

item.title: 👎Rick Hughes - Ray's Pharmacy, Orcas Island
item.description: Rick Hughes signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Ray's Pharmacy, Orcas Island.

item.title: 👎Kari VanderHouwen - Pharm-A-Save Granite Falls
item.description: Kari VanderHouwen signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Pharm-A-Save Granite Falls.

item.title: Write your Legislators during Focus on Advocacy Week - WSPTA
item.description: News article "Write your Legislators during Focus on Advocacy Week - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.

item.title: 👎💵Carolyn Logue - Washington Food Industry Association
item.description: Carolyn Logue signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Food Industry Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Chris Schaffner - Washington Food Industry Association
item.description: Chris Schaffner signed up to testify Con.

item.title: 👎💵Emily Wittman - Association of Washington Business
item.description: Emily Wittman signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Business. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎💵Leah Lindahl - Healthcare Distribution Alliance (HDA)
item.description: Leah Lindahl signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Healthcare Distribution Alliance (HDA). They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Fiscal Cutoff Passes, Tuesday Marks Major Deadline - WSPTA
item.description: News article "Fiscal Cutoff Passes, Tuesday Marks Major Deadline - WSPTA" from Washington St Pta.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-23/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-27/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 25; nays, 23; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 25; nays, 23; absent, 0; excused, 1.
